---
title: "Program of Study"
---

<!--
This program is free software: you can redistribute it and/or modify
it under the terms of the GNU General Public License as published by
the Free Software Foundation, either version 3 of the License, or
(at your option) any later version.

This program is distributed in the hope that it will be useful,
but WITHOUT ANY WARRANTY; without even the implied warranty of
MERCHANTABILITY or FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE.  See the
GNU General Public License for more details.

You should have received a copy of the GNU General Public License
along with this program.  If not, see <https://www.gnu.org/licenses/>.
-->

```{r load_libraries, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(results = 'asis', echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
pacman::p_load(tidyverse, glue)

source("./site_libs/script.R")
datapath <- "./site_libs/data/"
```

```{r eval=FALSE}
render_all()
```

<script src="./site_libs/script.js"></script>

## Brigham Young University - Idaho

I earned a Bachelor's of Science in Software Engineering with a minor in Computer Engineering and Data Science.

<div style="padding-left:1px;">

<span class="tooltipr">
<a href="javascript:showhide('diploma')">Diploma</a>
  <span class="tooltipRtext"><strong>2020 Graduate </strong><br/>My cumulative GPA was <br/> 3.6 out of 4 </span></span>
<div id="diploma" style="display:none;padding-left:20px;">

![](./site_libs/images/diploma.jpg)

</div></div>

### Software Engineering (BS)

* Intro to Software Development using C++
* Object-Oriented Development using C++
* Software Design and Development using Java
* Introduction to Programming for IT
* System Security 
* Professional Career Preparation 
* Senior Project 

### Data Science Minor

* Database Design and Development
* Data Intuition and Insight
* Data Wrangling and Visualization
* Machine Learning and Data Mining

### Computer Engineering Minor

* Electric Circuit Analysis 
* Electronic Devices and Circuits
* Microprocessor Based-System Design
* Digital System Design
* Computer Architecture
* Embedded Systems
* Advanced Embedded Systems

### Core {.tabset .tabset-fade}

#### Math and Science

* PreCalculus
* Differential Calculus
* Linear Algebra 
* Discrete Math 
* Intermediate Statistics
* Introduction to Chemistry
* Foundations of Science

#### Programming

* Intro to Computer Science and Engineering
* Intro to Programming using Python
* Object-Oriented Programming with Data Structures using Python
* Introduction to Databases using SQL
* Fundamentals of Digital Systems with Lab
* Web Design and Development
* Project Management

#### General

* Family and Human Relations
* Introduction to the Visual Arts and Design
* Writing and Reasoning
* Technical Communication

<hr/>

## Moorpark High School

I was able to take some college level courses in the process of getting my High School Diploma.

<div style="padding-left:0px;">

<span class="tooltipr"><a href="javascript:showhide('hs')">More Highschool Details</a>
<span class="tooltipRtext"><strong>2017 Graduate </strong></span></span>
<div id="hs" style="display:none;padding-left:20px;">

* Geometry Honors
* Algebra 2 Accelerated 
* PreCalculus Honors
* AP Calculus
* AP Chemistry
* AP Physics 1 & 2
* AP Art 2-D Design (Photography)
* Introduction to Computer Science using C++
* Introduction to Engineering

</div></div>


<hr />

<iframe src="./site_libs/footer.html" width="100%" height="100%" style="border:none;"></iframe>
